A

ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant.Status
Entrant has accepted the invitation.
acceptInvitation(Users, UserNotification) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.InvitationResponseController
Processes the acceptance of an event invitation.
acceptInvitation(String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Moves an event from invited/waitlisted to registered status.
AccountFragment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
A fragment that allows the user to view and manage their account information.
AccountFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AccountFragment
Default constructor for AccountFragment.
addEvent(Event) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.MainActivity
Persists a newly created event to Firestore.
addInvitedEvent(String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Adds an event name to the user's invited events list and removes it from waitlist if present.
addNotification(UserNotification) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Adds a notification to the user's notification list.
addUser(Users) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.MainActivity
Adds a new user document to the users Firestore collection if no document with the same e-mail address already exists.
addWaitlistedEvent(String) - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Adds an event name to the user's waitlisted events list.
AdminActivity - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Host activity for the administrator section of the application.
AdminActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminActivity

Admin detail screen for a single Event.
AdminEventDetailFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminEventDetailFragment
Required public no-arg constructor.

Admin fragment for browsing and managing all events in the platform.
AdminManageEventsFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminManageEventsFragment
Required public no-arg constructor.

Admin fragment for reviewing all notification logs recorded in the notification_logs Firestore collection.
AdminManageNotificationsFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminManageNotificationsFragment
Required public no-arg constructor.

Admin fragment that displays all registered user profiles in a 3-column grid.
AdminManageProfilesFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminManageProfilesFragment
Required public no-arg constructor.
AdminNotificationLogAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Adapter for displaying notification log entries in the admin notification management screen.
AdminNotificationLogAdapter(List<NotificationLogItem>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminNotificationLogAdapter
Constructs an AdminNotificationLogAdapter.
AdminUserAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
RecyclerView adapter that displays all registered users in the admin user-management screen.
AdminUserAdapter(List<Users>, AdminUserAdapter.OnUserClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserAdapter
Constructs an AdminUserAdapter.
AdminUserAdapter.OnUserClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Callback invoked when an admin taps a user card.
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Bottom-sheet dialog that shows full profile details for a single Users object in the admin console.
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserDetailBottomSheet
 
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet.OnAccountDeletedListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Callback invoked after the admin successfully deletes a user account so the parent fragment can remove the entry from its list without a full reload.
AdminUserDetailBottomSheet.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Callback used to navigate to the full detail screen of a created event.
AdminUserEventAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
RecyclerView adapter that lists events belonging to a specific user in the admin user-detail screen.
AdminUserEventAdapter(List<Event>, AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.AdminUserEventAdapter
Constructs an AdminUserEventAdapter.
AdminUserEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Callback invoked when an admin taps an event row in the user-detail screen.
APPLIED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant.Status
Entrant has applied and is in the pool for sampling.
applyAllFilters(List<Event>, String, boolean, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterHelper
Applies all filters (text, available-only, date range) with AND logic.
